caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, headphones, and a black sweatshirt with the word "BOSS" in gold lettering is seated at a desk in a studio setting. He is positioned in front of a white backdrop featuring several "UNIQUE HUSTLE" logos accompanied by gold stars. To his right is a professional microphone on a boom arm and a black mug with red and white text that reads "THE TALK OUT GAME." In the background, a blue screen displays the text "Where BOSSES Talk!". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, smiling and laughing as he looks toward someone off-screen. His expression shifts slightly between frames, moving from a wide smile to a more pronounced laugh. A small logo with a question mark and the text "TALK OUT" is visible in the lower-left corner of each frame.
